elementary-algebra-2e:c2s1.reason: A1 one-step equations review PA linear equations with integers; not A1 Foundations review.

elementary-algebra-2e:c2s2.reason: Multiplication/division properties deepen PA equation solving.

elementary-algebra-2e:c2s3.reason: Variables on both sides continue PA multi-step equations.

elementary-algebra-2e:c2s4.reason: General linear-equation strategy uses distributive property and both-sides solving.

elementary-algebra-2e:c2s5.reason: Fraction/decimal coefficients extend PA coefficient work inside the general strategy.

elementary-algebra-2e:c2s6.reason: Literal equations rearrange formulas using multi-step solving.

elementary-algebra-2e:c2s7.reason: Linear inequalities extend equation solving and G6 inequality ideas.

elementary-algebra-2e:c3s1.reason: Problem-solving strategy assumes fluent linear equations.

elementary-algebra-2e:c3s2.reason: Percent applications reuse PA percent fluency with A1 modeling.

elementary-algebra-2e:c3s3.reason: Mixture problems set up linear equations, often with decimals.

elementary-algebra-2e:c3s4.reason: Geometry applications extend PA triangle/rectangle/Pythagorean work.

elementary-algebra-2e:c3s5.reason: Uniform motion translates word problems into linear equations.

elementary-algebra-2e:c3s6.reason: Inequality applications need linear inequalities and modeling.

elementary-algebra-2e:c4s1.reason: Coordinate plane review continues PA rectangular coordinates.

elementary-algebra-2e:c4s2.reason: Graphing lines needs coordinates and linear-equation fluency.

elementary-algebra-2e:c4s3.reason: Intercept method is a graphing technique on top of linear graphs.

elementary-algebra-2e:c4s4.reason: Slope extends PA slope and linear graphs.

elementary-algebra-2e:c4s5.reason: Slope-intercept form packages slope with graphing lines.

elementary-algebra-2e:c4s6.reason: Writing line equations uses slope-intercept understanding.

elementary-algebra-2e:c4s7.reason: Graphing linear inequalities needs graphs of lines and inequality solving.

elementary-algebra-2e:c5s1.reason: Systems by graphing need graphing linear equations.

elementary-algebra-2e:c5s2.reason: Substitution solves systems algebraically after seeing graphical solutions.

elementary-algebra-2e:c5s3.reason: Elimination is an alternate algebraic system method; substitution provides the systems concept.

elementary-algebra-2e:c5s4.reason: System applications need both algebraic methods and modeling.

elementary-algebra-2e:c5s5.reason: Mixture systems combine systems with mixture modeling.

elementary-algebra-2e:c5s6.reason: Systems of inequalities combine system graphing with linear inequalities.

elementary-algebra-2e:c6s1.reason: Polynomial add/subtract continues PA polynomial work.

elementary-algebra-2e:c6s2.reason: Exponent properties continue PA exponent rules.

elementary-algebra-2e:c6s3.reason: Multiplying polynomials extends PA poly multiplication.

elementary-algebra-2e:c6s4.reason: Special products are patterned polynomial multiplications.

elementary-algebra-2e:c6s6.reason: Polynomial division extends monomial division and poly structure.

elementary-algebra-2e:c6s7.reason: Integer exponents and scientific notation deepen PA exponent work.

elementary-algebra-2e:c7s1.reason: GCF and grouping extend PA intro factoring.

elementary-algebra-2e:c7s3.reason: Factoring ax^2+bx+c generalizes monic trinomial factoring.

elementary-algebra-2e:c7s4.reason: Special-product factoring undoes special products; parallel to trinomials.

elementary-algebra-2e:c7s5.reason: General factoring strategy chooses among GCF, trinomial, and special cases.

elementary-algebra-2e:c7s6.reason: Solving quadratics by factoring needs factoring strategy and equation solving.

elementary-algebra-2e:c8s1.reason: Simplifying rational expressions uses factoring and monomial division ideas.

elementary-algebra-2e:c8s2.reason: Multiply/divide rationals builds on simplified rational expressions.

elementary-algebra-2e:c8s3.reason: Adding like-denominator rationals needs simplified forms.

elementary-algebra-2e:c8s4.reason: Unlike denominators need LCD from factoring and like-denominator addition.

elementary-algebra-2e:c8s5.reason: Complex rationals combine multiply/divide and unlike-denominator skills.

elementary-algebra-2e:c8s6.reason: Rational equations clear denominators using fraction-equation techniques.

elementary-algebra-2e:c8s7.reason: Proportion and similar-figure apps use rational equations and PA proportions.

elementary-algebra-2e:c8s8.reason: Motion/work rational apps need rational equations and motion modeling.

elementary-algebra-2e:c9s1.reason: Square-root basics continue PA square roots.

elementary-algebra-2e:c9s2.reason: Simplifying square roots uses prime/factor structure.

elementary-algebra-2e:c9s3.reason: Adding/subtracting roots needs simplified radical form.

elementary-algebra-2e:c9s4.reason: Multiplying roots uses simplified radicals; parallel to add/sub.

elementary-algebra-2e:c9s5.reason: Dividing roots extends multiplication of radicals.

elementary-algebra-2e:c9s6.reason: Radical equations need simplifying roots and equation solving.

elementary-algebra-2e:c9s8.reason: Rational exponents connect roots with integer-exponent rules.

elementary-algebra-2e:c10s1.reason: Square-root property solves quadratics; uses radical equations and factoring context.

elementary-algebra-2e:c10s2.reason: Completing the square uses perfect-square trinomials and square-root solving.

elementary-algebra-2e:c10s3.reason: Quadratic formula is derived from completing the square.

elementary-algebra-2e:c10s4.reason: Quadratic applications need a solving method and modeling.

elementary-algebra-2e:c10s5.reason: Graphing quadratics needs quadratic solutions and coordinate graphing.
